title: The Item System Overhaul ‚Äî Equip, Consume & Loot
changes: Item Template System ‚Äî 98 unified item definitions with types, rarities, effects
Consumable items now work! Gold, XP, Bond, Streak Shields, Forge Temp & more
Equipment from Gacha/Loot can now be equipped ‚Äî not just shop items
Unequip returns items to inventory (no more item loss!)
Active Buff system ‚Äî timed effects like XP boost, Gold 2x, Essenz boost
Discard items with confirmation dialog
Click inventory items ‚Üí Action popup (Use / Equip / Discard)
Diablo-style consume feedback toast (non-blocking)
Stats now have real effects: Kraft‚Üí+XP, Weisheit‚Üí+Gold, Ausdauer‚Üíless Forge decay
Passive Gacha effects active: Rarity boost, Pity reduction, Streak recovery
29 new pixel art loot item icons (128x128)
9 new NPC reward item icons with pixelated rendering
NPC reward items upgraded ‚Äî better stats + unique passive effects
Level requirement shown in item tooltips
image-rendering: pixelated for all icons ‚Äî crisp pixel art at every size
3 new NPCs: Der Elegante Herr, Vex die Archivarin, Captain Flint
50 new quest templates (248 total) ‚Äî more variety, more easter eggs
Pet feedback text removed (button no longer jumps around)
Class selection fix in profile endpoint

title: Alpha Feedback Batch ‚Äî Bugs, UI Polish & New Features
changes: Level-lock on quests enforced ‚Äî quests above your level are now properly gated

Quest duplicate fix ‚Äî prevented duplicate quests from appearing in pool
Stat card tooltips reworked ‚Äî click-to-open popups replace hover tooltips
NPC feedback panel selector expanded ‚Äî more NPC options in feedback mode
Quest pool cap enforced ‚Äî max 11 open quests at a time
NPC departure styling ‚Äî red banner on departing NPCs
Level up celebration animation ‚Äî visual fanfare on level up
Companion quest completion feedback ‚Äî Dobbie reacts to quest completions
Popout windows: ESC + click-outside + viewport centered ‚Äî consistent modal behavior
Quest refresh button green glow ‚Äî visual indicator for pool refresh
Quest difficulties adjusted ‚Äî rebalanced quest difficulty ratings
XP info panel added to Quest Board ‚Äî transparent XP breakdown display
WoW-style XP scaling curve ‚Äî exponential progression inspired by WoW Classic
Quest favorites system ‚Äî star icon to favorite quests, sort to top
Version tracking + New Version popup ‚Äî notifies players of new releases
